name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans at 1905 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006 in the Southwest Carrollton neighborhood is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 1528 reviews. Call +1 469-521-0837.
description_long:
TitleMax has operated its Summer Avenue Memphis location since February 2007, serving the greater Memphis area from a storefront one mile west of Highland Street, across from Auto Zone. With nearly two decades of presence in the local market, this location is one of several TitleMax branches in the Memphis metro area, with three additional stores within 3.4 miles. The store offers bilingual service and maintains extended weekday hours Monday through Friday, with Saturday availability.

This location offers two primary product lines. The first is a Title Pledge and Flex Line of Credit, a secured product that uses the customer's clear vehicle title as collateral. TitleMax performs a credit check but accepts most credit types, basing approval on vehicle value, the amount needed, and the borrower's ability to repay. Customers can withdraw from their credit line all at once or incrementally up to their limit, and they retain use of their vehicle throughout the loan term. The second product is an Unsecured Flexible Line of Credit, available both in-store and online, requiring a valid government-issued ID, a recent bank account statement, and proof of income if recurring deposits are not visible. Online applicants must reside in one of eleven eligible states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, or WI.

With over 481 Google reviews averaging a 5.0 out of 5, the Summer Avenue location has an exceptionally strong customer satisfaction record. Reviewers frequently cite specific staff members by name for professionalism and transparency. The store's combination of secured and unsecured lending products, bilingual staffing, and same-day funding capability distinguishes it from single-product lenders in the emergency cash space.

TitleMax serves a real need for borrowers who own their vehicle outright and face immediate cash demands that traditional banks cannot address quickly. However, title loans are inherently high-risk: using a vehicle as collateral means the asset is at stake if repayment becomes difficult. The website does not disclose specific interest rates or APR figures, which limits a borrower's ability to compare costs before visiting a store. The online personal loan product is also geographically restricted, limiting access for residents outside the listed states.
address: 1905 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

company_info.headquarters: 1905 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

pros: Same-day cash disbursement available upon approval
Accepts most credit types — vehicle title helps offset credit score limitations
Customers keep driving their vehicle throughout the loan term
Bilingual staff available at this Memphis location
Operating continuously at this location since February 2007
481+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating
Offers both secured (title-backed) and unsecured (personal line of credit) products
cons: Vehicle title is required as collateral — vehicle is at risk if the loan cannot be repaid
Interest rates and APR are not disclosed on the website, making cost comparison difficult before visiting
Online unsecured line of credit is restricted to residents of 11 specific states only
Store is closed on Sundays, limiting same-day access on weekends
Clear (lien-free) vehicle title required — borrowers with financed vehicles are ineligible for title loans
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or limited credit who need immediate emergency cash
Memphis-area residents who prefer or require bilingual financial service
Borrowers who want a revolving line of credit they can draw from incrementally rather than a lump-sum loan
People who need same-day funding and cannot qualify through traditional bank lending
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with imperfect credit who need emergency cash quickly and can use a clear car title as collateral. The main caveat is that title loans put the borrower's vehicle at direct risk if repayment is missed, and the website does not publish interest rates or APR, so borrowers should request full cost disclosure before signing any agreement.
services: Flex Line of Credit secured by vehicle title
Unsecured personal line of credit (online, select states)
Online loan application for personal lines of credit
Vehicle value assessment for loan qualification
Credit check with flexible approval criteria
Incremental credit line withdrawals up to approved limit
